welcome.title: Welcome to DodoStream
welcome.description: Let's get you set up in just a few steps

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the app

ui.title: Choose Your Style
ui.description: Pick a theme and adjust the UI scaling

profile.title: Create Your Profile
profile.description: Choose a name and avatar that represents you

integrations.title: Connect Your Accounts
integrations.description: Sync your watch history and watchlist with external services
integrations.about_description: Connect your Simkl account to automatically track what you watch and keep your watchlist in sync across all your devices.

addons.title: Add Streaming Sources
addons.description: Install addons to discover and stream content
addons.skip_message: You need at least one metadata addon to browse content. You can add addons later in Settings.
addons.about_description: DodoStream uses Stremio-compatible addons to provide content. You need at least one metadata addon to browse movies and TV shows.
addons.about_types: Addons provide different types of content:
addons.about_type_metadata_desc: - Browse catalogs and get information about content

home.title: Customize Home Screen
home.description: Configure how your home screen looks

playback.title: Playback Preferences
playback.info_desc: You can customize subtitle styles, player settings, and more in the Settings menu after setup.
